name: create_completion
description: Generate a text completion given a prompt string. Supports language models for raw text generation tasks like code completion, creative writing, and text continuation without conversational formatting.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for the completion.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: The prompt text to generate a completion for.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Higher values make output more random.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: If true, tokens are sent as server-sent events as they are generated.

choices.text: jumps over the lazy dog. This classic pangram contains every letter of the English alphabet.
